info.title: SpecFlow.Plus.LivingDoc.CLI
info.description: Don't add this package to your project. Install from commandline (dotnet tool install --global SpecFlow.Plus.LivingDoc.CLI) and use with SpecFlow.Plus.LivingDoc.Plugin. A dotnet tool for SpecFlow to generate a shareable HTML Gherkin feature execution report (living documentation).

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A dotnet tool for SpecFlow to generate a shareable HTML Gherkin feature execution report (living documentation). Use together with SpecFlow.Plus.LivingDocPlugin.

options.name: version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: project-language
options.description: Language of the feature file.

options.name: test-execution-json
options.description: Relative or absolute path to the test execution result JSON files. Relative GLOB pattern-matching is supported.

options.name: title
options.description: The header of the generated Living Documentation.

options.name: project-name
options.description: This name is used by the root node in the tree. If you do not enter a name here, the name of the feature folder is used by default

options.name: work-item-url-template
options.description: URL template to use to generate the work item links. e.g: https://dev.azure.com/fabrikam/FabrikamProj/_workitems/edit/{id}

options.name: work-item-prefix
options.description: Special tag you mark the scenarios with to link them to the respecting work items

options.name: binding-assemblies
options.description: Relative or absolute path to the binding assemblies.

options.name: output
options.description: Relative or absolute path to the output.

options.name: output-type
options.description: Type of the output file.

options.name: include-test-output
options.description: Include outputs in the FeatureData.json.

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information
